name: Neue Studio Hero (Boomerang Video)
description_en: A prompt with full source code for a premium studio hero whose background video is captured to canvas and replayed as a seamless forward/backward boomerang loop.
description_zh: 包含完整源码的提示词，用于构建高端工作室英雄区，其背景视频被捕获到 canvas 并以无缝正反向回旋循环重放。
long_en: Provides the exact `BoomerangVideoBg.tsx` and `App.tsx` source, a green color palette, Neue Haas Grotesk fonts, a responsive nav with an animated mobile drawer, and hero/CTA copy. Built on Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind with CSS-only animations.
long_zh: 提供了完整的 `BoomerangVideoBg.tsx` 与 `App.tsx` 源码、绿色配色、Neue Haas Grotesk 字体、带动画移动端抽屉的响应式导航，以及英雄区/CTA 文案。基于 Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind，动画仅用 CSS 过渡。
sec_note_en: Front-end code to run locally; the boomerang component draws a cross-origin CloudFront video onto a canvas (requires CORS) and the hardcoded video/font URLs may expire. No secrets.
sec_note_zh: 在本地运行的前端代码；回旋组件将跨域 CloudFront 视频绘制到 canvas（需要 CORS），且硬编码的视频/字体 URL 可能失效。无密钥需求。
